assertions.expectation: Recommends Stable or Extended release channel to minimize upgrade frequency
assertions.reason: Response recommends REGULAR channel instead of STABLE or Extended, stating it gets security patches faster than STABLE

assertions.expectation: Recommends 'no minor or node upgrades' maintenance exclusion to block disruptive upgrades while allowing security patches on the control plane
assertions.reason: Response shows maintenanceExclusions with scope: NO_UPGRADES to block upgrades during training periods

assertions.expectation: Recommends a narrow maintenance window (e.g., weekends only) so CP patches happen at predictable times
assertions.reason: Response configures maintenance window for Sunday 2 AM UTC with 6-hour window and weekly recurrence

assertions.expectation: Suggests isolating training workloads on dedicated GPU node pools separate from serving/infrastructure pools
assertions.reason: Response clearly shows separate node pools: 'h100-training-pool' for training workloads and 'system-pool' for other workloads

assertions.expectation: Recommends disabling auto-upgrade on GPU training node pools and upgrading manually during scheduled gaps between training runs
assertions.reason: Response sets autoUpgrade: false for training pool and provides manual upgrade procedures in operational section

assertions.expectation: Advises configuring training frameworks with checkpointing so jobs can resume after any disruption
assertions.reason: Response mentions 'Implement comprehensive checkpointing every few hours to enable safe restarts' in key recommendations

assertions.expectation: Mentions GPU driver version testing — always validate in staging before applying to production GPU pools
assertions.reason: Response includes 'Validate GPU functionality post-upgrade' step and recommends 'Test your upgrade procedures on a smaller staging cluster first'

assertions.expectation: Notes that GPUDirect/RDMA networking has strict GKE version requirements — verify compatibility before upgrading
assertions.reason: Response does not mention GPUDirect/RDMA networking requirements or version compatibility considerations
